---
title: "PROJECT_elements - Visual Guide"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: style.css
    include-after-body: theme_selector.html
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
    mermaid-format: svg
    mermaid:
      theme: dark
      themeVariables:
        cScale0: "#2d2d30"
        cScale1: "#202022"
        cScale2: "#2d2d30"
        cScale3: "#202022"
        cScale4: "#2d2d30"
        cScale5: "#202022"
        cScale6: "#2d2d30"
        cScale7: "#202022"
        cScale8: "#2d2d30"
        cScale9: "#202022"
        cScale10: "#2d2d30"
        cScale11: "#202022"
        cScaleLabel0: "#dcdcdc"
        cScaleLabel1: "#dcdcdc"
        cScaleLabel2: "#dcdcdc"
        cScaleLabel3: "#dcdcdc"
        primaryColor: "#2d2d30"
        primaryTextColor: "#dcdcdc"
        primaryBorderColor: "#5c7c8a"
        lineColor: "#5c7c8a"
        secondaryColor: "#161618"
        tertiaryColor: "#161618"
        mainBkg: "#202022"
        textColor: "#dcdcdc"
---

# 🏗️ PROJECT_elements - Visual Guide

> **System Identity:** PROJECT_elements is the experimental baseline for the 'Standard Model of Code'. It implements a **Four Hemisphere architecture** to solve the problem of AI context drift at scale. Every diagram in this atlas provides a stand-alone technical truth about the system's current state.

This document serves as the definitive visual atlas for the project, mapping the transition from a messy 13GB legacy repository to a high-fidelity, machine-navigable model.

---

## 1. System Architecture (The Symmetry Model)

The project is architected as a **Symmetry**, balancing the "Body" of the code with the "Brain" of its intelligence.

- **The Body**: Contains the `Collider Engine` and the `Codome Graph`. This is where physical implementation lives.
- **The Brain**: Contains the `Refinery` and `Agent Intelligence`. This is where conceptual understanding is generated.
- **The Logistics**: The layer of `Dispatchers` and `Couriers` that ensures information remains consistent between both hemispheres.

```{mermaid}
graph TD
    subgraph "THE BODY (Implementation)"
        CE[Collider Engine] --> G[Codome Graph]
        T[Theory Canon] --> G
    end

    subgraph "THE BRAIN (Intelligence)"
        R[Refinery] --> P[Parcels/Waybills]
        AI[Agent Intelligence] --> P
    end

    subgraph "LOGISTICS (Synchronization)"
        D[Dispatcher] --> C[Couriers]
        C -->|Active| CE
        C -->|Active| R
    end

    G <-->|Logistics| P
```

---

## 2. Data Topology (The Master Flow)

Information flows from the local disk through a refinement process into a persistent global state.

1.  **Ingestion**: Files are synced from the local disk to a `Cloud Mirror`.
2.  **Extraction**: The `Refinery` chunks code into `Parcels` wrapped in `Waybills` (provenance logs).
3.  **Synthesis**: Extracted intelligence is published to a `Neo4j Knowledge Graph` and a `Purpose Registry`.

```{mermaid}
graph TB
    subgraph "Local Space"
        Local["Local Disk"]
        Symmetry["Symmetry Validator"]
    end

    subgraph "Logistics Layer"
        GCS_Mirror["Code Mirror (GCS)"]
        GCS_JSON["Waybill Parcels"]
        CloudRun["Refinery Engine"]
    end

    subgraph "Intelligence Layer"
        Graph["Neo4j Graph Store"]
        Purpose["Purpose Field (π1-π4)"]
    end

    Local -->|Sync| GCS_Mirror
    GCS_Mirror -.-> CloudRun
    CloudRun -->|Publish| GCS_JSON
    CloudRun -->|Publish| Graph
```

---

## 3. The Consolidation Loop (Sequence)

How the system autonomously cleans and optimizes itself. This sequence ensures that any "drift" in the codebase is corrected without manual intervention.

```{mermaid}
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant D as Dispatcher
    participant R as Refinery
    participant C as Courier
    participant B as The Body

    D->>R: Identify out-of-sync symbols
    R-->>D: Generate Refined Parcels
    D->>C: Assign Fix-Task (Link/Placeholder)
    C->>B: Apply Consolidation Patch
    B-->>D: Return Verify Status
```

---

## 4. Data Relationship Schema (ER Diagram)

Defines the "Intimate Properties" of our data structures. Every file in the system is refined into multiple parcels, each linked to a parent waybill for 100% auditability.

```{mermaid}
erDiagram
    FILE ||--o{ PARCEL : "refines into"
    PARCEL ||--|| WAYBILL : "tracked by"
    SUBSYSTEM ||--o{ FILE : "manages"
    
    FILE {
        string path
        string hash
        int size
    }
    PARCEL {
        string parcel_id PK
        string logic_type
        int token_count
    }
    WAYBILL {
        string waybill_id PK
        datetime created_at
        string author_id
    }
```

---

## 5. Lifecycle of a Waybill (State Diagram)

Every concept in the **Brain** hemisphere follows a strict lifecycle to ensure the "Law" (Governance) is always satisfied.

```{mermaid}
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Ingested
    Ingested --> Refinement: Triggered
    Refinement --> Validating: Output Generated
    Validating --> Persistent: Law Satisfied
    Validating --> Failed: Symmetry Broken
    Persistent --> Archived: Project Completed
    Failed --> Ingested: Retry Loop
```

---

## 6. Developer Journey (CLI Experience)

The developer interacts with the `pe` (Project Elements) CLI to manage this complex environment. The goal is to move from manual search to intelligent navigation.

```{mermaid}
journey
    title Developer Workflow (pe CLI)
    section Discovery
      List subsystems: 5: Developer
      Search Codome: 4: Developer
    section Optimization
      Run Refinery: 5: Developer
      Fix broken links: 5: Agent
    section Verification
      Run Symmetry Audit: 5: Developer
      Generate Visual Guide: 5: Developer
```

---

## 7. Project Evolution (Timeline)

The transition from a legacy research repository to a production-ready Standard Model.

```{mermaid}
timeline
    title PROJECT_elements Roadmap
    2024 : Initial Research : Discovery of Codome
    2025 : The Bloat Phase : 13GB Legacy Growth
    2026 : The Great Consolidation : Refinery Launch : Symmetry Protocol
```

---

## 📊 Technical Specifications Summary

| Layer | System | Purpose | Technology |
|-------|--------|---------|------------|
| **Observer** | Governance | Quality Gates & Symmetry | Quarto, Mermaid |
| **Particle** | The Body | Collider Engine (Parsing) | Python, C++ |
| **Wave** | The Brain | Refinery (Intelligence) | LLM, Neo4j |
| **Logistics** | The Flow | Dispatchers & Couriers | Async Python |

---

---

## ⚖️ The Symmetry Law

The Standard Model of Code is maintained through the continuous reconciliation of the **Codome** (Implementation) and the **Contextome** (Documentation). By preserving **Intimate Properties** across all hemispheres, we ensure that the project remains a coherent, AI-navigable organism rather than a collection of orphaned files.

---

> [!TIP]
> **Noise Reduction**: If you find yourself scrolling too much, refer to the [Mermaid Masterclass](file:///Users/lech/PROJECTS_all/PROJECT_elements/governance/MERMAID_MASTERCLASS.md) to learn how to collapse or subgraph these views.
